title: barleria mitis
intro: Barleria mitis, also known as 'Butterfly Bush', is a shrub plant belonging to the Acanthaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Barleria mitis include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antihelmintic agent. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its medicinal use, and its leaves are also used in folk medicine for treating various ailments.
